# NIKSOFT — Software for delivery operations

> NIKSOFT builds production software for delivery fleets, cloud rendering pipelines, and AI-native team operations. Founded in 2024, headquartered in Almaty, Kazakhstan. Production deployments in the United States and Kazakhstan.

## RouteBuilder

A routing engine for delivery fleets. Inputs: orders, vehicles, time windows. Output: optimized daily routes computed on real road data using OR-Tools and OSRM. In production since 2024.

- [RouteBuilder landing](https://aleksnikolaev.github.io/routebuilder/)
- [RouteBuilder sitemap](https://aleksnikolaev.github.io/routebuilder/sitemap.xml)

Best fit: delivery fleets with 10+ vehicles, FMCG distribution, last-mile delivery, freight logistics. Sold per-deployment with full source code handover. On-premise or hosted.

## Contact

For pilot, deployment, and partnership inquiries:

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/niksoft-software

- WhatsApp: +7 705 371 31 77

## Engagement model

Three stages. Demo (free, one week, synthetic data, before-and-after on mileage). Pilot (paid, two to three weeks, real client data, parameter calibration). Deployment (license, four to six weeks, full integration with CRM/ERP/GPS, driver application rollout, source code handover).

No subscription. No vendor lock-in. The client owns the source code.
